source.name: Schools gate — heuristic based on state-level K-12 rankings
source.method: Binary gate. PASS unless state in documented bottom-decile list (LA/NM/MS/WV/AK/OK).
source.caveat: Heuristic only. For Phase 2 (specific house hunting), pull metro-level district data via Niche or GreatSchools API.

Memphis.rationale: Tennessee schools variable; Nashville-area (Williamson County) is top-5 in state

Nashville.rationale: Tennessee schools variable; Nashville-area (Williamson County) is top-5 in state

Louisville.rationale: State KY not in documented bottom-decile; metro-level data not pulled

Pittsburgh.rationale: State PA not in documented bottom-decile; metro-level data not pulled

Dallas.rationale: Texas schools highly variable; suburban districts often top-100 (Keller, Southlake, etc.)

Houston.rationale: Texas schools highly variable; suburban districts often top-100 (Keller, Southlake, etc.)

San Antonio.rationale: Texas schools highly variable; suburban districts often top-100 (Keller, Southlake, etc.)

Austin.rationale: Texas schools highly variable; suburban districts often top-100 (Keller, Southlake, etc.)

Denver.rationale: Colorado schools well-rated statewide; Cherry Creek (Denver suburb) top-rated

Rochester.rationale: Minnesota schools consistently rank in top 5 nationally (Niche, US News)

Minneapolis.rationale: Minnesota schools consistently rank in top 5 nationally (Niche, US News)

Appleton.rationale: Wisconsin schools consistently rank in top 10 nationally

Madison.rationale: Wisconsin schools consistently rank in top 10 nationally
